description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a gently flared rim. The surface is decorated with a painted pastoral scene featuring two figures, one in a white dress and the other in a purple dress, set against a background of blue sky, clouds, and greenery. The artwork wraps around the body of the vase, with the figures occupying the central area and the landscape extending to the sides. The colors are soft and muted, giving the vase a delicate, hand-painted appearance. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramics. The vase appears well-preserved, with no visible chips or cracks.
description: A tall, slender ceramic vase with a smooth, glossy finish and a hand-painted pastoral scene featuring two figures and a landscape. The artwork wraps around the vase, creating a delicate and decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows a figure in a white dress seated in a garden with clouds and sky above.
description_view_1: This view reveals both figures, with the second figure in a purple dress appearing beside the first, and more of the garden scene visible.
description_view_2: The figure in the purple dress is most prominent here, with the landscape and sky continuing around the vase.
description_view_3: This view shows mostly the landscape and sky, with only a partial glimpse of the figures, emphasizing the painted background.
